subcodes.title: Words to Isabel Fraser, spoken on 1913-09-28
subcodes.first_line: I desire that thou mayst be filled with Bahá'u'lláh. Thou must concentrate all thy ideas and thoughts around the promotion
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
